Synth.
Docs Quick Start Examples Mission Studio Architecture Community First Contact

The Mission

Human intent is captured as a Mission.

Human intent, captured

Mission: Space Mission Tracking Application

Purpose: Track space missions, crew assignments, and launch windows with a simple, realistic implementation.

As executed

ai-agent:

synth mission create --subject "Space Mission Tracking Application" --purpose "Track space missions, crew assignments, and launch windows with a simple, realistic implementation."

Recorded as an Event

The capture is itself an immutable fact: MISSION_CREATED is the second event of the 32-event history.

Projected from the canonical evidence archive · ← Back to Synth
